title: サイレンススズカ、覚醒①

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle watches on TV as Silence Suzuka
faces off against Matikanefukukitaru in her first
race after returning from Hong Kong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka takes first place by a margin of over ten
lengths, captivating the hearts of the spectators.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Elated to see her friend win, Taiki Shuttle cheers
and kicks off a party in celebration.
